versions.prompt: Very dark abstract texture for a card background. Subtle red sandstone and snow texture blended together. Dark warm tones — deep rust-black (#1A0F0D) fading to near-black (#0D0908). A barely visible hint of desert warmth underneath the darkness. Must be very dark (90%+ dark) so white text is readable on top. Feels like Utah canyon country at night in winter. Organic, natural grain, not digital.
versions.analysis: Red sandstone with snow dusting reads distinctly Utah. The warm rust undertone differentiates it from the other cards. Dark enough for text. The canyon country feel comes through — the rock layering is convincing.
versions.iterate_notes: The center warm spot is slightly bright — could be more evenly dark. Snow patches are a nice touch.

versions.prompt: Canyon wall striations with frost, layered sandstone, evenly dark surface.
versions.analysis: Layered sandstone striations with much more even darkness across the surface. Frost adds a winter touch without being too bright.
versions.iterate_notes: Try slot canyon smooth flowing walls — Antelope Canyon style for a more iconic Utah texture.

versions.prompt: Slot canyon smooth flowing walls, dark warm tones, Antelope Canyon style abstract.
versions.analysis: Gorgeous smooth flowing sandstone walls. Beautiful but a bit too detailed and visually busy for a text background.
versions.iterate_notes: Try desert varnish mineral surface — more abstract and flat, better for text overlay.

versions.prompt: Desert varnish mineral surface, very dark with subtle red patches, abstract flat texture.
versions.analysis: Very dark with subtle red patches showing through the desert varnish. Abstract and flat — good for text. Reads as distinctly desert Southwest.
versions.iterate_notes: Try cracked desert clay/mud for a more textural, distinctly Utah feel.

versions.prompt: Cracked desert clay/mud texture, dark earth tones, dried playa surface.
versions.analysis: Distinctly Utah with the cracked clay pattern. A touch bright in spots but very recognizable and textural.
versions.iterate_notes: Could darken the bright spots and add a subtle frost overlay to tie it back to winter. Or blend with the v1 canyon wall striations.
